rankings.why_it_matters: Signals a capital flow trend away from traditional IT services towards AI-driven models.

rankings.title: Svatantra Microfin completes amalgamation with Chaitanya India Fin Credit
rankings.india_relevance: Reports a major consolidation in India's microfinance sector, creating a large new entity.
rankings.why_it_matters: Continues the trend of MFI consolidation, impacting competition and access to credit in rural India.

rankings.title: DGTR recommends anti-dumping duty on rayon yarn imports from China
rankings.india_relevance: A trade policy action directly protecting Indian textile manufacturers from Chinese imports.
rankings.why_it_matters: Affects input costs for the textile sector and reflects ongoing trade defense measures against China.

rankings.title: App-based cab drivers go on strike in Gurugram: All you need to know
rankings.india_relevance: Highlights labour unrest in India's urban gig economy, a key employment sector.

rankings.india_relevance: Signals a major governance and strategic reset at one of India's largest solar module manufacturers.
rankings.why_it_matters: Leadership changes at a key renewables player can indicate shifting strategy in a competitive sector.

rankings.india_relevance: Shows India's strategic positioning in global economic governance, resisting a China-led framework.

rankings.title: UK tariff shield may revive Tata Steel’s UK business—but not before FY27
rankings.india_relevance: Analyses the impact of foreign trade policy on the overseas fortunes of a major Indian corporate group.
